top_signals.title: India Considers Spending Curbs to Protect Fiscal Deficit Target
top_signals.summary: India’s government is weighing spending cuts across parts of the budget as higher oil prices inflate subsidy bills and threaten to derail its fiscal consolidation plans, according to officials familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Broadcom to lose more than $300bn in market value as revenue forecast disappoints
top_signals.summary: Shares in chip company fall as much as 15% in after-hours trading

top_signals.title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 4 2026
top_signals.summary: The DCE iron ore futures trended weaker today. The most-traded contract I2609 closed at 767 yuan/mt, down 1.85% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices fell 6-11 yuan/mt from the previous day. Traders showed limited enthusiasm in offering; steel mills made few inquiries; overall spot market transactions were mediocre as of now.
